summary.headline: Vikram Luthar to resign as executive officer with transition agreement.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company announced that Vikram Luthar will resign from his executive positions effective September 30, 2024. During a transition period, Luthar will serve as a non-executive employee to provide support. He will receive his 2023 performance incentive award and 2021 performance share unit shares, along with continued benefits and a prorated 2024 cash incentive payment if he remains employed through July 1, 2024.

extraction_notes: The filing primarily reports on the departure of an executive officer and includes a transition agreement. No financial numbers or segment performance data were disclosed.
